channel.title: HistoryPulse — The Uncut Story
channel.description: Deep-dive uncut narrations from real historical sources.
channel.itunes:author: HistoryPulse

item.title: Vijayanagara Chapter 5: Raichur, the Broken Sultan, and Krishna Deva Raya’s Monument of Victory
item.description: This episode follows Krishna Deva Raya at the summit of Vijayanagara’s power: the immense march on Raichur, the debated but devastating battle of May 19, 1520, the humiliation of the Adil Shah, and the political aftershocks that reshaped the Deccan and the Portuguese coast. It also traces how victory became architecture and spectacle through temples, tanks, irrigation works, Nagalapur, and the colossal Narasimha, even as signs of dynastic strain darkened the end of the reign. Based on A Forgotten Empire (Vijayanagar) by Robert Sewell (1900).
